state_registry.label: Loading snapshot
state_registry.operator_meaning: A local snapshot source is being read; no success metrics or approvals are inferred.

state_registry.label: Empty / no snapshots
state_registry.operator_meaning: No canonical local snapshot is available; next action remains blocked/review.

state_registry.label: Current success projection
state_registry.operator_meaning: A reviewed local projection is current; still separate from release and issue-completion approval.

state_registry.label: Input error / parse failure
state_registry.operator_meaning: The source could not be parsed or validated; the UI refuses to infer approvals from bad input.

state_registry.label: Blocked gate
state_registry.operator_meaning: A gate/reviewer/human/security dependency is blocking progress with an explicit unblock condition.

state_registry.label: Stale snapshot
state_registry.operator_meaning: Observed data is older than the source or explicitly stale; next safe action is refresh/review.

state_registry.label: Contradictory state
state_registry.operator_meaning: Conflicting sources are shown side-by-side and are not collapsed into done/released.

state_registry.label: Private evidence unavailable
state_registry.operator_meaning: Evidence is known only as redacted/unavailable metadata; raw private payloads are never displayed.

state_registry.label: Review pending/failed/passed lane
state_registry.operator_meaning: Worker done, reviewer result, human approval and release state are separate lanes.

state_registry.label: Long dense data
state_registry.matches_density: many cards, gates, blockers or evidence refs
state_registry.operator_meaning: Long gate/evidence/worker lists stay segmented and searchable without decorative KPIs.
